{{Quote|Wanted for questioning in several cases of public damages.|Arko's bounty posting|<ref name="BH" />}}
'''Ayk Arko''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] who worked with the [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Sebolto]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He was wanted for questioning by the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant's]] [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Security Force]], who put a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on his head. The [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] found Arko on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]] and captured him alive in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].

==Biography==
The [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] [[Ayk Arko]] was a criminal active in the final [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. By the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was wanted for questioning by the internal affairs department of the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Security Force]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. The force placed a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on the Gran's head, offering 5000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for his capture alive, or 2500 credits for his [[Death/Legends|death]]. In 32 BBY; however, Arko was on the planet [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]], where he had become associated with a [[Sebolto's drug cartel|drug cartel]] run by the [[Dug/Legends|dug]] [[King/Legends|King]] [[Sebolto]].<ref name="BH" />

{{Gamemechanics}}
While on Malastare in 32 BBY, Arko spent time in the planet's jungles, where he encountered the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]. Fett, who was in the jungles attempting to reach [[Sebolto's Palace]], captured Arko alive and later claimed the full bounty on his head from the Coruscant Security Force.<ref name="BH" />
{{Endgame}}

==Personality and traits==
Arko was a male Gran with [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and pink skin. Upon meeting Fett in the jungle's of Malastare he attacked the hunter with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] immediately, but was bested by him in combat.On Malastare the Gran wore black and brown [[Clothing/Legends|clothing]].<ref name="BH" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ayk Arko first appeared in the [[Prima Games]] [[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|strategy guide]] for the [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'', as well as in the game itself. Both were released in [[2002]], with the guide slightly preceding the game. In the game Arko is an optional secondary bounty who players can choose to capture or kill for his bounty, or simply kill for no profit. Given that it is more profitable to capture Arko rather than kill him this article assumes that as part of 100% game completion this is the option players took.
